scripts.test:auth:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-Auth/VGA Store Auth.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-Auth/VGA-Store-Auth-Testcase.csv" --folder Register --folder Login --folder ChangePassword --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/auth-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:user:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA USER - BVA Testing.postman_collection 123.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA_Store_User_Profile_BVA.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/user-profile-blackbox-newman.json" && newman run "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA USER - BVA Testing.postman_collection 123.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-AUTH-USER/VGA-Store-USER/VGA_Store_User_Address_BVA.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/user-address-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:product-user:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGA-store-product/product-user/VGA Store Product User.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGA-store-product/product-user/PRODUCT_USER.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/product-user-blackbox-newman.json"
scripts.test:payment:blackbox: newman run "postman/VGAShop_Payment/VGAShop Payment.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGAShop_Payment/payment-test-data-from-TC_Payment_71.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/payment-blackbox-newman.json" && newman run "postman/VGAShop_Payment/VGAShop Payment.postman_collection.json" -e "postman/env/VGA_Store_Environment.postman_environment.json" -d "postman/VGAShop_Payment/payment-bva-data-from-TC_Payment_92.csv" --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export "reports/payment-bva-blackbox-newman.json"
